Nicktoons.uk.title: ALVINNN!!! and The Chipmunks
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school and ends up in class with Alvin in 'Back to School', then in 'Bromance', Simon has found a new best friend, but then gets ditched.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Tales of the Ninja Turtles
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Leo becomes the superhero Night Ninja, taking on... a florist and some dognappers.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dread's obsession with recapturing his shard overrules all reason. Rusty Rose agrees the shard is too powerful for any one person, including Sonic.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Sonic Prime
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Rebel Rouge and Renegade Knuckles walk the newly liberated streets of New Yoke City unsure of what's next, until the Mothership redocks atop the Yoke.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Jack gets his first phone and mistakes are immediately made in 'Wrong Text', then in 'Emergency Family Tribunal', when the last hallasand goes missing, fingers point to Halmoni.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Wylde Pak
Nicktoons.uk.desc: LAD has a sleepover and Jack makes a promise in 'J-LAD', then in 'Big Honey', when Will's parents visit Canyon Valley, news of the sale of their bee farm sends the family into a spiral.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: A thawed-out cave bear is mistaken for Boog and causes havoc when they bring it back to camp.

Nicktoons.uk.title: Open Season: Call of Nature
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Pets have tricked the camp in 'Camp Palace', then in 'Will the Real McSquizzy Please Stand Up?', A bump on the head turns McSquizzy into a kinder squirrel.

Nicktoons.uk.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Plankton's computer wife Karen ends up working at the Krusty Krab after being replaced by a newer model in 'Karen 2.0', and in 'InSPONGEiac', SpongeBob can't get to sleep, and asks Patrick to help.
